scene_title: Due bussole sul ponte — la simbiosi vecchio/nuovo
narrative_role: Atto III, sintesi narrativa. L'AI come complemento del passato.

prompt_components.shot_type: Close-up on the ship's binnacle (compass pedestal)
prompt_components.subject: an antique brass binnacle pedestal on the ship's deck, holding TWO compasses side by side: the old brass compass (familiar, traditional) and the new orange-glowing compass (with hexagonal glass)
prompt_components.action: both compasses' needles work in harmony, the orange one pulsing gently with its inner light; in the background, blurred, the helmsman's back is visible at the wheel; in the far distance, beyond the deck rail, OTHER SHIPS are visible — but they are completely still, not moving
prompt_components.environment: ship's deck in afternoon light, wood texture, sea visible beyond, other distant ships motionless on horizon
prompt_components.camera_movement: slow dolly in toward the two compasses, ending at intimate close framing
prompt_components.lighting: warm afternoon light, plus the steady orange inner glow of the new compass
prompt_components.mood: synthesis, victory of those who understood first — but quiet, not arrogant
prompt_components.audio_hint: gentle wood creaking, soft wind, the warm resonance of the orange compass, music at peaceful resolution

_critical_note: Le altre navi all'orizzonte = competitor che non l'hanno ancora capito. Devono essere visibili ma immobili.
acceptance_criteria: Due bussole entrambe visibili e distinte
La nuova è arancione, la vecchia è ottone tradizionale
